title: Sunday Soul Sessions Elle Dillon Reams And Friends
company: Sunday Soul Sessions: Elle Dillon-Reams and friends
description: Sunday soul sessions: Elle Dillon-Reams & friends Hosted by acclaimed poet and performer Elle Dillon-Reams, this special Brighton Fringe event brings together a carefully curated lineup of local poets, storytellers & surprise guests, with live musical underscoring weaving through the night. Each event presents a different lineup of artistic magic, so settle in at Lost in the Lanes with a glass of something good and let yourself be stirred, soothed, & inspired. This is Sunday done properly. Warm, soulful, unmissable. "Dillon-Reams is poetry in motion, heady, soul-searching, and emotionally real. Boundless energy, humanity & humour." YOURHARLOW
content_warnings: May contain moments of strong language, and potentially the odd bad joke
